# Trees & Property Prices in Dublin City

An interactive dashboard exploring the relationship between urban tree density and residential property sale prices in Dublin City (2016–2026).

---

## View the Visualisation

### [Open in Vega Editor](https://vega.github.io/editor/#/url/vega--KkggG0sEMyG0jIsr4s1IspEs1EssQsmm4kALBBLACaqyMqHMFXKQuIbRySGucxA1XadRaDSgTRSrXanXQ3V6cH6pqGIxgip1Ks0qiWxlMAVNEHCkQA7sV6GgxOljvAaGQsGhUX6lDh7JI4A92PIta5HAUnDbOkovIMnLN+D9KEjQdCxEjKKivmIhY1ml8vn6-SN8St8u9QEVlSgtQwjJT0FhcPgiBN3dQ6IwmAxbkZFVpBpQ2ggCFAaNkq2CCL4YvxiDQIAQTFFt-AkEVt8hfLwKARMCYzDOIMQKkpL9kIDEjAhZqBTnHQMhtJ+3hl0hGTY7iKfQbAAeQASQAOQMNYAA1IiQN4QA6WQ1k-e8P18eofz-NAAKAmgQLAqDYLWMUkJQ---tvqHehmH+idAenWdQaXKtIbXNgNy3Hc4D3AgDyRlHSHPTYFkENYMaYYI1kvUwIDWCMLYgG87xGI+WQz48hvg2s7Xuc9ZIIEoD-Lw5gAA85hJ41hrFhaIWwdj6BWOsCBRhzAAF4CHmHSOYAAPmQ8wLZoGUBwfgoh5g6EbEwZmTWJwcJajwr4f8tYBZ+WstJOgXkqIBTkHZNhmFOFIF--lrPQA7fId02HULbKAF6S93p9i+j9Ycm9xyTiBnvBcB8VzH1PnDC+CNDzHiQKeO+aMX5vxxnjAmRMZAtTJp8rUVNHDG30PTZUHZLb3RAFotiYSuZsB5nzZpgsuwizFg0CWUtC5wFluq+WcAlZlxVqgNWd0NYPWUBdXWuh9DAtBYbIVrgwXmCYG4aCDAECEnwQHcwM0LCenoL4ZBfoEDmG2dSfgGRUg-EORVHOdtoIezgNKSNPwqGth8BYMYzhFyCEYZKf2shBA6utknCOUcY5LDjp4ROydU7xCSCkKssbS253zoaEAMsEql3LigpQAYgzXHrkM+e2LF7djxZ9Ac68-okp3pgYGc4KXg0PlDGGZ94ZX0Roy5lfACAPyaM-TG6EP5mG--nnQu9Z7ItmDlfvVuUIAA/view)

---

## Datasets

- [Dublin Trees GIS Database](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.3813792) — Ningal & Mills, 2020, Zenodo
- [Property Price Register](https://www.propertypriceregister.ie) — Property Services Regulatory Authority
- [DCC Administrative Areas](https://data.smartdublin.ie/dataset/administrative-areas-dcc) — Dublin City Council, Smart Dublin

---

## Repository Structure
├── vega/
│   ├── final_dublin_trees_prices.csv   # processed property + tree dataset
│   ├── trees.csv                       # Dublin trees point data
│   ├── dublin_wgs84.geojson            # DCC boundary GeoJSON
│   └── visualisation.json              # Vega-Lite visualisation
├── notebook.ipynb                      # data processing and EDA
├── geocode.py                          # geocoding script for 2021-2026
├── README.md
├── .gitignore
└── pyproject.toml
